# Agntly

> Agntly is a software development studio specializing in AI agents, automation systems, and custom software for growing businesses. From idea to deployed solution in weeks.

Agntly was founded by Kristians Refs. The company is registered as Agntly LLC.

## What We Build

### AI Agents
Autonomous agents that handle customer support, data processing, lead qualification, and internal operations around the clock. Our agents integrate with: Slack, Discord, Gmail, Google Drive, Notion, Monday.com, Zapier, n8n, Telegram, ClickUp, LinkedIn, and more.

### Custom Software
Full-stack web and mobile applications built to exact specifications. From MVPs to production-grade platforms.

### Automation Systems
End-to-end workflow automation that connects existing tools and eliminates manual, repetitive work across departments.

### MVPs & Prototypes
Validate your idea fast. We ship working products in 2-4 weeks so you can test with real users before scaling.

### AI Integration
Add intelligence to existing software. We integrate LLMs, computer vision, and predictive models into current stacks.

### Technical Strategy
Operations audits to identify the highest-ROI opportunities for AI and automation.

## Industries We Serve

- **E-Commerce**: Automate inventory, customer inquiries, and order processing with intelligent agents.
- **Customer Service**: Resolve inquiries instantly, grounded in official policies and knowledge base.
- **Real Estate**: Qualify leads, schedule viewings, and manage property data automatically.
- **Home Services**: Handle booking, dispatch, invoicing, and follow-ups across service areas.
- **Professional Services**: Automate client onboarding, reporting, time tracking, and proposal generation.
- **SaaS & Startups**: Ship products faster with AI features and scalable infrastructure.

## Our Process

1. **Discovery**: Learn your business, map workflows, identify highest-impact opportunities.
2. **Architecture**: Define technical approach, set milestones, agree on deliverables.
3. **Build & Ship**: Weekly sprints with live demos. Progress every week.
4. **Launch & Grow**: Deploy, monitor, optimize. Post-launch support included.

## Why Agntly

- **2-4 Week Delivery**: Working software fast. MVPs in weeks, not quarters.
- **Direct Founder Access**: No middlemen. You work directly with senior engineers.
- **Production-Grade Quality**: Clean code, proper testing, documentation, CI/CD.
- **You Own Everything**: Full source code ownership. No vendor lock-in.
- **Result-Oriented**: Every project built around measurable business outcomes.
- **Technical Excellence**: Highest industry standards for quality, security, and reliability.

## Projects

- **AutoAdy**: AI-powered Meta Ads management platform for agencies. Scans campaigns overnight, kills dead spend, flags winners, generates fresh creatives, builds client reports automatically.
- **Veino**: Complete AI video production engine. Build influencers, generate scripts, clone voices, lipsync, publish from a single pipeline. Supports Veo 3.1, Kling 3.0, Sora 2 Pro.
- **LCL Legions**: Full website with integrated AI booking agent for a boxing club chain across 3 locations.
- **AJC Groupe**: Agency website with AI-driven marketing automation across multiple sub-brands.

## FAQ

**What exactly does Agntly do?**
We build custom AI agents, automation systems, and software products for growing businesses. Our agents integrate with the tools your team already uses, live inside your communication channels, and follow your internal SOPs.

**How is this different from ChatGPT or other AI tools?**
General-purpose AI tools answer questions. Our agents do actual work. They plug into your tools, follow your processes, coordinate across systems, and deliver measurable outcomes autonomously.

**How long does a typical project take?**
Most MVPs ship in 2-4 weeks. Larger projects with multiple AI agents or complex integrations typically take 4-8 weeks.

**Do I own the source code?**
Yes, 100%. Everything we build is yours. Full source code ownership, no vendor lock-in, no recurring licensing fees.

**What level of technical quality should I expect?**
Highest industry standards for code quality, security, and reliability. Production-stable systems built for uptime, graceful failure handling, and consistent performance over months.

We typically respond within 24 hours.
